flavorText: 🤖 A robot cleaner rolls in. It beeps disapprovingly at the crumbs on your desk.
📦 Gino from accounting has been 'optimized'. His mug remains. Nobody dares touch it.
☕️ The new AI coffee machine replaces the barista. It spells everyone's name correctly. It's unsettling.
📊 Your manager has been replaced by an algorithm. Performance reviews are now push notifications.
🦾 The last human coworkers now communicate exclusively in JSON. {"mood": "fine"}
💀 Nobody laughs at the memes anymore. The meme wall has been converted to a KPI dashboard.
🥀 The ficus has dried up. A small funeral is held. The drone does not attend.
